texto: And regardless of whomever I’m with for whatever amount of time, I’ll be with myself the whole time and I want to be good to her. I want her to have a heart like an ocean: endlessly vast, full of wonder, and navigable only by the brave.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kelton Wright: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “And regardless of whomever I’m with for whatever amount of time, I’ll be with myself the whole ti…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, self-love, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.

frase_original: And regardless of whomever I’m with for whatever amount of time, I’ll be with myself the whole time and I want to be good to her. I want her to have a heart like an ocean: endlessly vast, full of wonder, and navigable only by the brave.

texto: Get inches from the mirror and tell yourself what happened. Give yourself the news like an autopsy. At 10:02 on Saturday, he discarded you. At oh-nine-hundred-hours, you were overlooked. At whatever time of whenever day, it didn’t work, and it wasn’t what you thought, and it left you in the ash and the rain. Cry and holler and selectively remember whatever it is you want. It will be whatever you want.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kelton Wright: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Get inches from the mirror and tell yourself what happened. Give yourself the news like an autops…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, breakup, whatever pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e dia-chuvoso.

Cry and holler and selectively remember whatever it is you want. It will be whatever you want.

texto: I had been too tired and too sick with melancholy to ride my bike, knowing full well that riding my bike was a cure.
explicacao: Citação de Kelton Wright sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “I had been too tired and too sick with melancholy to ride my bike, knowing full well that riding …” articula reflexao, depression, tired em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: They say the young are fearless, but I would rather be brave. To dive into something with no regard for the consequences is not insignificant, but to predict, recognize, and prepare for all possible consequences and still charge on is something to marvel at, something to aspire to.
explicacao: Citação de Kelton Wright sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “They say the young are fearless, but I would rather be brave. To dive into something with no rega…” articula coragem, reflexao, something em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
